description_long: This object is a portable stereo boombox with a rectangular, boxy body and a pair of large, circular speaker grilles on the front face. The casing is primarily dark gray or black, with metallic or plastic accents and two prominent round knobs on the front, likely for volume and tuning. A sturdy, flat handle runs along the top, accompanied by a brown, flexible shoulder strap for easy carrying. The side views reveal a slim profile and a set of small buttons or indicator lights on one edge, suggesting additional controls or status indicators. The back features a single, raised circular element, possibly a battery compartment or auxiliary port. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for outdoor or urban use.
description: A portable stereo boombox with dual front speakers, a top handle, and a brown shoulder strap. The body is dark with metallic accents and visible control knobs.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large speaker grilles, two control knobs, and the top handle with the brown strap.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile, brown strap, and a row of small buttons or indicator lights.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a single raised circular feature and the back of the handle and strap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the strap and the edge of the front control knobs.
